loadingScreen: Somebody's grandmother is already judging your ingredient choices.
If you add carrots, we won't stop you... but we will screenshot this.
There are 19 tribes and 73 Egusi opinions. You're about to trigger at least 12.
Calibrating the 'Is it soup or is it stew?' detection algorithm...
Remember: Egusi without palm oil is just sad seeds in water.
Your mortar and pestle technique is being pre-judged.

stationArrival.washing_area: Time to wash. Cleanliness is next to Egusi-ness.
stationArrival.prep_station: Mise en place! (That's French for 'Don't mess this up')
stationArrival.cooking_stove: The fire awaits. So does judgment.
stationArrival.serving_counter: Presentation matters. Even if the kitchen is chaos.

conversionPrompt.message: Is this Efo Egusi YOUR style?
conversionPrompt.noButton: NO. This is not my style.
conversionPrompt.cta: Create Your Own Nigerian Recipe Game — No Coding Required!
